description: Claude-mem memory system hooks - Windows PowerShell version

hooks.command: powershell -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -Command "$_R = $env:CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT; if ([string]::IsNullOrEmpty($_R)) { $_R = (Join-Path $env:USERPROFILE '.claude' 'plugins' 'marketplaces' 'thedotmack' 'plugin') }; & node (Join-Path $_R 'scripts' 'bun-runner.js') (Join-Path $_R 'scripts' 'worker-service.cjs') hook claude-code context"

powershell -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -Command "$_R = $env:CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT; if ([string]::IsNullOrEmpty($_R)) { $_R = (Join-Path $env:USERPROFILE '.claude' 'plugins' 'marketplaces' 'thedotmack' 'plugin') }; & node (Join-Path $_R 'scripts' 'bun-runner.js') (Join-Path $_R 'scripts' 'worker-service.cjs') hook claude-code session-init"
